name: hotel-app
description: Hotel PMS - open `frontend/` and `backend/` for package scripts

scripts.test: npm test --prefix frontend && npm test --prefix backend
scripts.docker:migrate-db: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U hotel -d hotel < backend/db/migrate_legacy_roles.sql
scripts.docker:migrate-pms: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U hotel -d hotel < backend/db/migrate_pms_tables.sql
scripts.docker:migrate-multitenant: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U hotel -d hotel < backend/db/migrate_multitenant.sql
